titleText: JTF News: ABC News Australia, France 24
mainText: President Trump called on Australia to provide asylum to Iranian women's soccer players.
An attempted attack with explosives in New York City is under investigation.

titleText: JTF News: CBC News, BBC News
mainText: Heavy rains and flooding killed at least 23 people in Nairobi.
An explosion occurred in front of a synagogue in Liege, Belgium.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, BBC News
mainText: A Russian missile struck an apartment building in Kharkiv, Ukraine, resulting in at least 10 deaths.
